query:
SELECT 
  DATE(pt.paid_at) AS paid_date,
  SUM(CASE WHEN JSON_EXTRACT(pt.raw_json, '$.source') IS NULL THEN CAST(pt.amount AS DECIMAL(18,2)) ELSE 0 END) AS fastfone_report,
  SUM(CAST(dcc.payment_tx_amount AS DECIMAL(18,2))) AS our_cache
FROM payment_transactions pt
LEFT JOIN debt_collected_cache dcc 
  ON dcc.payment_external_id = pt.external_id 
  AND dcc.section = pt.section
WHERE pt.section = 'Fastfone365'
  AND DATE(pt.paid_at) BETWEEN '2026-04-01' AND '2026-04-30'
  AND JSON_EXTRACT(pt.raw_json, '$.source') IS NULL
GROUP BY DATE(pt.paid_at)
ORDER BY paid_date
LIMIT 10;
